data.title: LSL Property Services Enhances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
LSL Property Services ( (GB:LSL) ) has shared an update.

LSL Property Services PLC announced the repurchase of 7,000 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback program. The shares were acquired at an average price of GBp 263.6623 and will be held in treasury, impacting the company’s share capital structure by increasing the number of treasury shares to 1,588,761, while the total shares in issue with voting rights remain at 103,570,189.

More about LSL Property Services

LSL Property Services PLC operates in the real estate industry, focusing on property services. The company is involved in activities such as residential property sales, lettings, and financial services, primarily serving the UK market.

YTD Price Performance: -13.16%

Average Trading Volume: 62,795

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £271.5M

data.title: GK8 Enhances Institutional Access to DeFi with Avalanche Integration
data.description:
Galaxy Digital Holdings ( (TSE:GLXY) ) has shared an update.

GK8 by Galaxy has integrated its unlimited MPC (uMPC) technology with the Avalanche blockchain, enhancing institutional access to DeFi applications. This integration allows institutions to securely engage with DeFi through MetaMask Institutional, leveraging Avalanche’s low transaction fees and rapid finality. The uMPC technology supports all EVM-compatible chains, ensuring secure asset management without compromising transaction speed, thereby fostering greater institutional participation in DeFi.

More about Galaxy Digital Holdings

GK8 by Galaxy is a company that offers a comprehensive self-custody platform, focusing on providing secure and efficient access to decentralized finance (DeFi) applications. It operates within the blockchain industry, emphasizing secure digital asset management for institutional clients.

YTD Price Performance: -32.56%

Average Trading Volume: 194,758

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: $4.11B

data.title: Facephi Biometria SA Announces Share Transactions by Nice & Green
data.description:
Facephi Biometria SA ( (ES:FACE) ) just unveiled an update.

Facephi Biometria SA announced that Nice & Green (N&G) conducted purchase transactions of the company’s shares, which accounted for less than 0.7% of the total trading volume on BME Growth. These transactions represent less than 0.03% of N&G’s total shares in Facephi, and no sales of shares were made by N&G during this period.

More about Facephi Biometria SA

Facephi Biometria SA operates in the biometrics industry, focusing on providing innovative biometric solutions for identity verification and security. The company is known for its facial recognition technology, catering to various sectors including banking and finance, to enhance user authentication processes.

data.title: Astrea S.r.l. Announces Voluntary Public Purchase Offer for Bifire S.p.A.
data.description:
Bifire S.p.A. ( (IT:FIRE) ) just unveiled an update.

Astrea S.r.l. has announced a voluntary public purchase offer for all ordinary shares of Bifire S.p.A., aiming to delist the company from Euronext Growth Milan. The offer includes a premium on recent share prices and is structured to avoid the need for regulatory approval due to its size, with the offer document to be published voluntarily for transparency.

More about Bifire S.p.A.

data.title: Mondadori Group Prepares for April 2025 Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Arnoldo Mondadori Editore SPA ( (IT:MN) ) has issued an announcement.

Arnoldo Mondadori Editore S.p.A. has released documents related to its upcoming Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for April 16, 2025. These documents, which include the call notice, Directors’ Explanatory Reports, and information on the Performance Share Plan and Short-Term Incentive Plan, are accessible to the public through various channels, ensuring transparency and compliance with regulatory requirements. This announcement underscores the company’s commitment to governance and shareholder engagement.

More about Arnoldo Mondadori Editore SPA

Arnoldo Mondadori Editore S.p.A. is a prominent company in the publishing industry, offering a wide range of products and services including books, magazines, and digital content. The company focuses on delivering high-quality content to a diverse audience, maintaining a strong presence in the Italian market and beyond.

data.title: WH Smith PLC Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
WH Smith ( (GB:SMWH) ) has provided an announcement.

WH Smith PLC, a prominent player in the retail sector, has announced the repurchase of 27,777 of its ordinary shares as part of a buyback program initiated in September 2024. This move is in line with the authority granted by shareholders earlier in January 2025. The company plans to cancel these shares, which is part of a broader strategy that has seen the acquisition of over 2 million shares to date. This buyback program is a strategic effort to optimize capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of shares in circulation.

More about WH Smith

data.title: CLS Holdings Executives Acquire Shares Under Incentive Plan
data.description:
CLS Holdings ( (GB:CLI) ) has issued an announcement.

CLS Holdings plc announced that its CEO Fredrik Widlund and CFO Andrew Kirkman acquired ordinary shares under the company’s Share Incentive Plan. This transaction, which took place on March 10, 2025, involved purchasing shares at 71.8 pence each, with each executive receiving one matching share for every partnership share purchased. The notification aligns with the UK Market Abuse Regulation, indicating transparency and compliance in executive transactions.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer Prices €500 Million Eurobond to Bolster Financial Position
data.description:
Wolters Kluwer N.V. ( (NL:WKL) ) has shared an update.

Wolters Kluwer has successfully priced a €500 million seven-year senior unsecured Eurobond with an annual coupon of 3.375 percent, set to mature in 2032. The proceeds from this bond, which was placed with a broad range of institutional investors across Europe, will be used for general corporate purposes, potentially strengthening the company’s financial position and supporting its operations across its diverse market sectors.

More about Wolters Kluwer N.V.

Wolters Kluwer is a global leader in providing information solutions, software, and services for professionals across various sectors including healthcare, tax and accounting, financial and corporate compliance, legal and regulatory, corporate performance, and ESG. The company reported annual revenues of €5.9 billion in 2024, serves customers in over 180 countries, operates in over 40 countries, and employs approximately 21,600 people worldwide. It is headquartered in Alphen aan den Rijn, the Netherlands.

data.title: State of Norway Increases Stake in Siemens Energy
data.description:
Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) has provided an announcement.

Siemens Energy AG announced a change in voting rights, with the State of Norway, through its Ministry of Finance, acquiring a 3.21% stake in the company. This acquisition reflects an increase from a previous holding of 2.88%, highlighting a growing interest from international stakeholders. The change in voting rights is significant for Siemens Energy as it may influence future corporate decisions and strategies, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a leading company in the energy sector, specializing in the production and supply of energy technologies. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and operates globally, focusing on sustainable and innovative energy solutions. Siemens Energy is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including the regulated market in Frankfurt and free markets in Berlin, Dusseldorf, Hamburg, Hannover, Munich, Stuttgart, and Tradegate.
